---
language: swift
exerciseType: 1
---

# --description--

En Swift las variables de cadena se pueden declarar solo usando comillas dobles:
```swift
let x = "May"
```

# --instructions--

Declara una variable llamada `month` con el valor de `june`.

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --asserts--

`month` debe ser igual a `"june"`.

```swift
tryCatch(month == "june")
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
let month = "june"
```
